caption: A video captures a gaming screen displaying a player profile for "JASON PIERRE-PAUL" in a sports video game. The interface features a dark purple and black theme with a photo of the athlete in a white and black uniform. On-screen text includes "ROLB 90," "Team Name: Ravens," and "College: UP." Menu options such as "Compare," "Promote to starter," "Add to sets," "Auction," and "Trade" are visible. In the bottom-left corner, a small webcam overlay shows a young man with blond hair wearing a dark shirt. As the sequence progresses, the man’s facial expression changes; he starts with a neutral look, then opens his mouth in a surprised or excited expression, and finally smiles broadly while looking toward the screen. The game interface remains static throughout the clip, focusing on the player's "HISTORY," "DESCRIPTION," and "ARCHETYPE" sections.
